BACHELOR.TITLE: B.Sc. IMIT / AI
BACHELOR.CONTENT: The Information Management and Information Technology program combines the contents of computer science, information technology and business administration. The additional specialization in Applied Computer Science offers a stronger technology orientation, so that this study program variant can be compared with Applied Computer Science.

YOUCO.TITLE: Business Internship
YOUCO.CONTENT: During my internship, Youco GmbH started to set up a digital test center for Corona rapid tests using the Checkpoint app. I modified the existing interface for a self-service terminal and set up a website that displays the area of an ongoing model project on a map.

ENTIAC.TITLE: Web Developer
ENTIAC.CONTENT: Besides my studies I am working as a student assistant at Entiac GmbH. Thereby I am part of an agile scrum team, with the goal to create a modern interface for mobile data processing.

HIWI.TITLE: Research Assistant
HIWI.CONTENT: In the summer semester of 2022, I pursued employment as a tutor for the Java programming practical course. My tasks include planning and leading the tutorials, offering office hours and correcting homework and exams.
